_comment_permissions: MACF App minimum permission set per DR-019. `actions: read` is included for coordinator/review agents to debug team workflow runs via `gh run list` — leaving it off triggers a 401 that silently falls through to stored user auth (see issue #72 for the attribution trap).
_comment_events: MACF agents react to issues (labels + comments) and PRs (created + reviewed). Adjust if your agent participates in different coordination surfaces.
name: macf-<agent-role>
